# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.

Prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security


{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vnetName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subnetName": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vnetName'), '/subnets/', parameters('subnetName'))]",
      "properties": {
        "addressPrefix": "10.0.1.0/24"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "subnetResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName'))]"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vnetName')]",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "10.0.0.0/16"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "default",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.1.0/24"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vnetName'), '/subnets/default')]",
      "properties": {
        "addressPrefix": "10.0.1.0/24"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "AllowVnetOutBound",
            "protocol": "All",
            "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
            "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
            "access": "Allow"
          },
          {
            "name": "AllowAzureLoadBalancerInbound",
            "protocol": "Tcp",
            "sourceAddressPrefix": "CloudApplicationGatewayPoolIPAddresses",
            "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
            "access": "Allow"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('nicName')]",
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "properties": {
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "properties": {
        "location": "West US",
        "sku": {
          "name": "Standard_LRS"
        }
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",

      "properties": {

      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ]

            "10.0.0.0/16"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "default",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.1.0/24"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vnetName'), '/subnets/default')]",
      "properties": {
        "addressPrefix": "10.0.1.0/24"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('nicName')]",
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "properties": {
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "properties": {
        "location": "West US",
        "sku": {
          "name": "Standard_LRS"
        }
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ],
